title: Kliknik

The '''Kliknik''' was a dangerous insectoid species native to the jungles of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. These voracious carnivores lived in large underground hives and reported only to their queen, who oversaw every last Kliknik.<ref name="SWG:K" /> Hive members carried out specialized tasks, dividing them into workers, hunters, warriors and defenders.<ref name="SWG" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a hive of aggressive klikniks inhabited the [[Temple of the Blueleaf Cluster/Legends|Temple of the Blueleaf Cluster]].<ref name="SWG:TTotB" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Maldien]] conducted illegal and highly dangerous [[bioengineering]] experiments in a [[Illegal Lab (Corellia)|laboratory]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to create very aggressive and intelligent creatures. This included engineered klikniks.<ref name="SWG:CMCOtZ">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Coronet Murmurs: Clear Out the Zoo|Corellia}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Klikniks appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
